content.query:
--Create Dedicated SQL Pool

CREATE DATABASE inceptez_retaildb
(
    EDITION = 'DataWarehouse',
    SERVICE_OBJECTIVE = 'DW100c'
);

CREATE SCHEMA bank_schema;

Create table bank_schema.bank_txns
(
    txnid int,
    txndate date,
    custid varchar(20),
    amt float,
    branch varchar(50),
    region varchar(50)
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,  -- distributes data evenly across all nodes
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX  --large amount of data, compress and best of performance
);

--supports all CRUD(create,read,update,delete) operations

select * from bank_schema.bank_txns;


INSERT INTO bank_schema.bank_txns (txnid, txndate, custid, amt, branch, region)
VALUES 
(1001, '2026-04-01', 'CUST001', 1500.50, 'T. Nagar', 'Chennai');
INSERT INTO bank_schema.bank_txns (txnid, txndate, custid, amt, branch, region)
VALUES 
(1002, '2026-04-02', 'CUST002', 2750.00, 'Adyar', 'Chennai');
INSERT INTO bank_schema.bank_txns (txnid, txndate, custid, amt, branch, region)
VALUES 
(1003, '2026-04-02', 'CUST003', 500.25, 'Jayanagar', 'Bangalore');
INSERT INTO bank_schema.bank_txns (txnid, txndate, custid, amt, branch, region)
VALUES 
(1004, '2026-04-03', 'CUST001', 3200.00, 'T. Nagar', 'Chennai');
INSERT INTO bank_schema.bank_txns (txnid, txndate, custid, amt, branch, region)
VALUES 
(1005, '2026-04-05', 'CUST004', 120.00, 'Hitech City', 'Hyderabad');


select * from bank_schema.bank_txns;

--update
UPDATE bank_schema.bank_txns set amt = 2000 where branch = 'Jayanagar'

select * from bank_schema.bank_txns;


--delete
DELETE FROM bank_schema.bank_txns where txnid=1005;

select * from bank_schema.bank_txns;


--HASH

Create table bank_schema.bank_txns_hash
(
    txnid int,
    txndate date,
    custid varchar(20),
    amt float,
    branch varchar(50),
    region varchar(50)
)
WITH
(
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX,  --large amount of data, compress and best of performance
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(region)  -- distributes data evenly across all nodes
);

--replicate

Create table bank_schema.bank_txns_replicate
(
    txnid int,
    txndate date,
    custid varchar(20),
    amt float,
    branch varchar(50),
    region varchar(50)
)
WITH
(
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX,  --large amount of data, compress and best of performance
    DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE  
);


--heap index
Create table bank_schema.bank_txns_heap_indx
(
    txnid int,
    txndate date,
    custid varchar(20),
    amt float,
    branch varchar(50),
    region varchar(50)
)
WITH
(
    HEAP, 
    DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE  
);

--clustered index

Create table bank_schema.bank_txns_cluster_indx
(
    txnid int,
    txndate date,
    custid varchar(20),
    amt float,
    branch varchar(50),
    region varchar(50)
)
WITH
(
    CLUSTERED INDEX(region), 
    DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE  
);

select * from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES


/*

Row oriented data storage 
txnid,txndate
101,2026-01-01
102,2026-01-01
103,2026-01-01

Column oriented data storage
101,102,103
2026-01-01,2026-01-01,2026-01-01


*/
